title: This Is Bad... They Just Shut Down FABLE 5
summary: The video discusses the shutdown of Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models after three days due to a US government order, raising concerns about whether public access to frontier AI systems will be restricted. The author argues this incident signals a broader pattern of government control over powerful AI capabilities.
writeup: The video reports that Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down after three days following a US government order. It frames the incident as a signal that public access to frontier AI systems could be restricted, and argues the episode fits a broader pattern of government control over powerful AI capabilities. The central concern raised is regulation of who can reach frontier models and on what terms.
